description: C++ malloc branch leak: only freed in one branch of conditional

expected.notes: malloc at line 5 only freed when flag is true — aspirational branch-aware state analysis

Deliberately suppressed by Layer D (`is_c_buffer_call_literal_safe` in src/ast.rs): literal source (`"hello"`) has statically-bounded length — no attacker-controlled overflow vector. Positive coverage for the unsuppressed path lives in tests/fixtures/real_world/cpp/taint/gets_strcpy.cpp.
